category_sources: Official GitHub README says cf2tf converts CloudFormation templates to Terraform: https://github.com/DontShaveTheYak/cf2tf
source_facts.description says it converts CloudFormation templates to Terraform HCL.
display_name_sources: Official repository name and README use cf2tf: https://github.com/DontShaveTheYak/cf2tf

repo_sources: Official GitHub repository identifies DontShaveTheYak/cf2tf as the source project: https://github.com/DontShaveTheYak/cf2tf
